docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,975.00 FILED BY SCOTT, DAVID AS TO DEFENDANT LEVITT, BONNIE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-30-2011 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AUG-17-2011, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LEVITT, BONNIE
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SCOTT, DAVID IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT LEVITT, BONNIE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF SCOTT, DAVID AS TO DEFENDANT LEVITT, BONNIE
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-30-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-30-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-30-2011 - JUDGMENT.
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO ON 05/29/2024 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153.
